register.note: The spine plot self-describes (inline 'y-hat — the model's line' in prediction-blue, a claim title, manipulation hint, live stat table, and gold/blue prose terms bound to the marks), though one label short of distill-momentum/02's five labeled regimes.

Judged conservatively from stills: a single explanatory load (line eases up once) plus learner-driven live refit and a ballooning penalty square in Run/Break give a steppable, explanatory vocabulary, even if 3b1b's synchronized animation can't be verified from a frame.

Semantic grammar is held with no dilution (truth=gold, prediction=blue, error reserved for pink residuals, param=tinted readouts) and carried into prose via weight+underline so colour is never the sole carrier — exceeding r2d3-trees/00's class-colour use on the prose binding.

verdict.summary: Human review complete — satisfied at register 3.
